# Copilot Instructions for LakshayOS

- Use TypeScript everywhere.
- Prefer reusable components over duplicated UI.
- Keep application architecture clean and modular.
- Follow SOLID design principles.
- Keep components small and focused.
- Prioritize accessibility and semantic markup.
- Optimize for performance and reduce bundle size.
- Write production-ready code only.
- Never generate placeholder implementations unless explicitly requested.
